# md-check

> AI-powered technical SEO and AEO auditor that scores pages for search-engine indexability and AI answer-engine visibility.

## Product

- [Home](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/): The md-check web app — audit any URL for SEO and AEO signals (sign-in required).

## Guides

Public feature deep-dives explaining each score and signal md-check measures.

- [All guides](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/guide): Index of the feature deep-dive pages.
- [SEO score](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/guide/seo): How the 0–100 technical-SEO grade is built — indexability, no-JS visibility, structured data, on-page basics, and Core Web Vitals.
- [AEO score](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/guide/aeo): Answer-engine readiness — the signals that make AI engines read, trust, and cite a page.
- [Content structure & answerability](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/guide/content): Structuring pages the way AI extracts answers — answer-first passages, question-style headings, and scannable chunks.
- [Freshness](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/guide/freshness): Exposing recent, machine-readable last-updated signals, and why stale pages lose citations.
- [E-E-A-T (trust)](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/guide/eeat): Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trust — author identity, credentials, and outbound citations.
- [Structured data](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/guide/schema): schema.org JSON-LD types, rich-result eligibility, and entity attribution for AI.
- [AI crawler access](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/guide/aiaccess): Separating training bots from search/retrieval bots — and why blocking retrieval bots removes you from AI answers.
- [AI visibility tracking](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/guide/citations): Measuring real visibility across answer engines and surfacing competitor citation gaps.
- [Templates & segments](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/guide/segments): Auditing templatized sites cheaply with sampling and saved directory segments.
- [Trends & regressions](https://md.weregoingplaces.xyz/guide/trends): Tracking score and issue movement across runs, and attributing changes to templates.
